user_payload.normalized_incident_summary: Sedikit Basta masuk mulut tanpa sengaja.

escalation.instruction: Seek medical attention immediately after mouth rinse and water.

parsed_json.incident_summary: Tertelan sedikit Glufosinate-ammonium (Basta) secara tidak sengaja.

escalate_now.instruction: Segera cari bantuan medis setelah membilas mulut dan minum air.
escalate_now.reason: Paparan bahan kimia Glufosinate-ammonium melalui saluran pencernaan memerlukan evaluasi medis profesional.
